data.title: Solo Leveling
data.description: 10 years ago, after 'the Gate' that connected the real world with the monster world opened, some ordinary people received the power to hunt monsters within the Gate.

data.title: Omniscient Reader
data.description: Only I know the end of this world. One day our protagonist, Kim Dokja, finds that the web novel he has been reading for ten years has become reality.
